title: Load contact section and verify Hablemos form is visible
description: Verifies the contact widget loads asynchronously and the Hablemos form is available to the user.

steps.description: Scroll to the contact section labeled "Contacto" or "Hablemos"

title: Switch to Hablemos tab and verify Email method fields appear
description: Verifies selecting the Email contact method shows the email input path for contacting.

steps.description: Scroll to the contact section labeled "Contacto" or "Hablemos"

title: Switch to Hablemos tab and verify Teléfono/WhatsApp method fields appear
description: Verifies selecting the Teléfono/WhatsApp contact method shows phone-related inputs instead of email.

steps.description: Scroll to the contact section labeled "Contacto" or "Hablemos"
Verify element "Código de país" dropdown is visible
Verify element "Teléfono" or "Número" field is visible
Verify element "Enviar Mensaje" submit button is visible

title: Validation: submit with all required fields blank
description: Verifies required-field validation prevents submission and shows visible error messaging when fields are empty.

steps.description: Scroll to the contact section labeled "Contacto" or "Hablemos"

title: Validation: invalid email format is rejected
description: Verifies invalid email input triggers visible validation feedback and prevents success confirmation.

steps.description: Scroll to the contact section labeled "Contacto" or "Hablemos"
Type "Mensaje de prueba" into the "Mensaje" textarea

title: Validation: message required even when other fields are filled
description: Verifies the form blocks submission when message is missing and shows a visible required indicator.

steps.description: Scroll to the contact section labeled "Contacto" or "Hablemos"

title: Company field is optional: leaving it blank does not block validation on other fields
description: Verifies the optional company field is not required by ensuring validation does not target it when left empty.

steps.description: Scroll to the contact section labeled "Contacto" or "Hablemos"
Type "Mensaje de prueba" into the "Mensaje" textarea

title: Contact method toggling persists correctly when switching between Email and Teléfono/WhatsApp
description: Verifies users can switch contact method radios and the corresponding input fields update visibly.

steps.description: Scroll to the contact section labeled "Contacto" or "Hablemos"
Verify element "Teléfono" or "Número" field is visible

title: Open Service Request tab from landing page anchor and verify required fields are visible
description: Verifies the Service Request (Solicitud de Servicio) tab can be opened and the core required fields are displayed to the user.

steps.description: Wait for element "Solicitud de Servicio" tab to be visible
Verify element "Requester name" field is visible
Verify element "Task title" field is visible
Verify element "Task description" field is visible
Verify element "Desired start date" field is visible

title: Submit Service Request successfully using Email contact method (no attachment)
description: Verifies a user can complete all required fields with Email as the contact method and sees a success popup after submission.

steps.description: Wait for element "Solicitud de Servicio" tab to be visible
Fill "Task description" with "Please review the service request flow for validation and submission."
Pick desired start date as an available future date

title: Submit Service Request successfully using Phone contact method (no attachment)
description: Verifies a user can submit a ticket using Phone as contact method including country selection and phone number, and sees a success popup.

steps.description: Wait for element "Solicitud de Servicio" tab to be visible
Fill "Task description" with "Testing phone-based contact submission without attachments."
Pick desired start date as an available future date

title: Required field validation: attempt submit with all fields empty
description: Verifies the form blocks submission and shows visible validation errors when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Wait for element "Solicitud de Servicio" tab to be visible

title: Validation: Email contact method selected but email is missing
description: Verifies choosing Email contact method requires an email value and prevents submission until provided.

steps.description: Wait for element "Solicitud de Servicio" tab to be visible
Fill "Task description" with "Submitting with Email method but without email to confirm validation."
Pick desired start date as an available future date

title: Validation: Phone contact method selected but phone is missing
description: Verifies choosing Phone contact method requires a phone number (and/or country) and prevents submission until provided.

steps.description: Wait for element "Solicitud de Servicio" tab to be visible
Fill "Task description" with "Submitting with Phone method but without phone to confirm validation."
Pick desired start date as an available future date

title: Open scheduling tab from landing page and see appointment type cards
description: Verifies the contact widget loads and the Agendar tab displays the available appointment types.

steps.description: Wait for the contact widget section to be visible
Verify text "Solicitud de Servicio" is visible

title: Agendar tab is usable after switching away and back
description: Verifies the scheduling tab content persists or re-renders correctly after changing tabs in the contact widget.

steps.description: Wait for the contact widget section to be visible

title: Complete quote calculator flow with selections and reach success confirmation
description: Verifies a user can move through Steps 1–3, make service and extras selections, and reach the post-submit success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on one service category in Step 1
Click on one service card to toggle it on

title: Step 1 requires selecting at least one category before continuing
description: Verifies the user cannot advance from Step 1 to Step 2 without selecting a category.

steps.description: Verify text "Solicitar Cotización" is not visible

title: Toggle service card on and off updates the visible selection state
description: Verifies clicking a service card toggles selection state and the UI reflects the change.

steps.description: Click on one service category in Step 1
Click on one service card to toggle it on
Click on the same service card to toggle it off
Verify element "Price summary sidebar" is visible

title: Optional extras checkbox toggling is reflected in the price summary area
description: Verifies selecting an optional extra checkbox changes what is shown in the price summary section.

steps.description: Click on one service category in Step 1
Click on one service card to toggle it on
Verify element "Price summary sidebar" is visible
Click one optional extras checkbox for the selected service

title: Counter extras increment and decrement changes the displayed quantity
description: Verifies counter-type extras can be increased and decreased and the UI quantity changes accordingly.

steps.description: Click on one service category in Step 1
Click on one service card to toggle it on
Click the increment button for a counter extra
Click the decrement button for the same counter extra
Verify element "Price summary sidebar" is visible

title: Proceed to Step 3 and verify required field validation prevents submission
description: Verifies leaving required contact fields empty shows validation feedback and does not show a success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on one service category in Step 1

title: Email field rejects an invalid email format on Step 3
description: Verifies an obviously invalid email format triggers visible validation and prevents success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on one service category in Step 1
Type "Test User" into the name field

title: Deep-linking via URL hash preselects categories and allows continuing
description: Verifies the calculator supports URL hash deep-linking to preselect categories so the user can continue without manual selection.

steps.description: Verify element "Price summary sidebar" is visible

title: Complete diagnostic quiz and return to Step 1 with recommendations applied
description: Verifies the 3-question diagnostic quiz completes and applies recommended category selections back on calculator Step 1.

steps.description: Verify text "No sé por dónde empezar" is visible
Click "No sé por dónde empezar" button
Answer question 2 (do you have a website)
Verify element "recommended category selection" is visible

title: Quit quiz before finishing and ensure no category changes are applied
description: Verifies closing or leaving the quiz early results in returning to Step 1 with no auto-selected categories applied.

steps.description: Click "No sé por dónde empezar" button
Verify element "recommended category selection" is not visible

title: Refresh the calculator page after quiz completion and verify recommendations are not persisted
description: Verifies quiz selections are session-only (client state) and do not persist after a full page reload.

steps.description: Click "No sé por dónde empezar" button
Answer question 2 (do you have a website)
Verify element "recommended category selection" is visible
Verify element "recommended category selection" is not visible

title: Start the quiz and navigate away to another route, then return and verify no changes applied
description: Verifies leaving the calculator mid-quiz and coming back does not apply any category selections.

steps.description: Click "No sé por dónde empezar" button
Verify element "recommended category selection" is not visible

title: Verify quiz can be launched repeatedly without breaking Step 1 state
description: Verifies opening the quiz, closing it, and opening it again does not leave the UI in a blocked or inconsistent state.

steps.description: Click "No sé por dónde empezar" button
Click "No sé por dónde empezar" button

title: Verify quiz completion returns user to Step 1 (not Step 2 or Step 3)
description: Verifies that after answering all questions, the calculator returns to Step 1 specifically with the quiz-applied selections.

steps.description: Click "No sé por dónde empezar" button
Answer question 2 (do you have a website)

title: Verify quiz UI shows one question at a time in correct order
description: Verifies the diagnostic quiz advances through question 1 to question 3 sequentially after each answer.

steps.description: Click "No sé por dónde empezar" button
Answer question 2 (do you have a website)

title: Filter 'Todos' shows the full set of case study cards
description: Verifies that selecting the 'Todos' filter displays the complete case studies grid.

steps.description: Verify element "case studies grid" is visible
Verify element "case study card" is visible

title: Filter 'Chatbots' shows only chatbot case study cards (or no-results state)
description: Verifies the Chatbots filter updates the grid to only matching items, otherwise shows a no-results message.

steps.description: Verify element "case studies grid" is visible

title: Filter 'CRM' updates the case studies grid to CRM items (or no-results state)
description: Verifies the CRM filter applies successfully and the page reflects the filtered state.

steps.description: Verify element "case studies grid" is visible
Verify element "case study card" is visible

title: Filter 'Web' updates the case studies grid to Web items (or no-results state)
description: Verifies the Web filter applies successfully and the page reflects the filtered state.

steps.description: Verify element "case studies grid" is visible
Verify element "case study card" is visible

title: Filter 'IT Partner' updates the case studies grid to IT Partner items (or no-results state)
description: Verifies the IT Partner filter applies successfully and the page reflects the filtered state.

steps.description: Verify element "case studies grid" is visible
Verify element "case study card" is visible

title: Switching filters: Chatbots -> Todos restores full list
description: Verifies users can change filters multiple times and return to an unfiltered state.

steps.description: Verify element "case studies grid" is visible
Verify element "case study card" is visible

title: Filter buttons are visible and selectable on the Case Studies page
description: Verifies the filter control set is present and users can select each filter without navigation away from the page.

steps.description: Verify element "filter button 'IT Partner'" is visible

title: Accept All cookies dismisses the banner
description: Verifies the cookie consent banner appears on first visit and can be dismissed via Aceptar Todo.

steps.description: Verify text "Aceptar Todo" is not visible

title: Reject Optional cookies dismisses the banner
description: Verifies the user can reject optional cookies and the banner dismisses.

steps.description: Verify text "Rechazar Opcionales" is not visible

title: Open Configure panel from banner and save custom preferences
description: Verifies the preferences panel opens from Configurar and can be saved using Guardar Preferencias.

steps.description: Verify text "Guardar Preferencias" is not visible

title: Privacy policy opens cookie configuration panel
description: Verifies the cookie preferences panel can be opened from the privacy policy using the Configurar Cookies trigger.

steps.description: Verify text "Guardar Preferencias" is not visible

title: Banner does not reappear after accepting all (same session)
description: Verifies that after accepting all cookies, the banner does not immediately reappear on the landing page within the same browsing session.

steps.description: Verify text "Aceptar Todo" is not visible
Verify text "Aceptar Todo" is not visible

title: Configure panel can be reopened after saving preferences
description: Verifies that after saving cookie preferences, the user can reopen the preferences panel via Configurar Cookies on the privacy policy page.

steps.description: Verify text "Guardar Preferencias" is not visible

title: IT Partner page loads and shows both plans in comparison table
description: Verifies the IT Partner plan page renders the plan comparison content for Standard and Evolución.

steps.description: Scroll to the plan comparison section

title: Reveal elements activate when scrolled into view on the landing page
description: Verifies that scroll reveal elements become visibly revealed when they enter the viewport.

steps.description: Verify element "a section with content below the hero" is visible
Scroll to the next section below the hero
Verify element "an animated/revealed content block in the section you scrolled to" is visible
Scroll further down to another section with cards or steps
Verify element "a card/step item that animates into view" is visible

title: Reveal-left style content becomes visible when scrolled into view
description: Verifies that left-to-right reveal content becomes visibly revealed upon viewport entry.

steps.description: Scroll down until a section with side-by-side text and visual content is visible
Verify element "the left-aligned text block in that section" is visible
Scroll a little further so the next content block enters the viewport
Verify element "a newly appearing text or card that slides in from the left" is visible

title: Reveal-right style content becomes visible when scrolled into view
description: Verifies that right-to-left reveal content becomes visibly revealed upon viewport entry.

steps.description: Scroll down until a section with cards, testimonials, or process steps is visible
Verify element "a content item aligned to the right side of the section" is visible
Scroll further down so another item enters the viewport
Verify element "a newly appearing card or block that slides in from the right" is visible

title: Reveal-scale elements appear when scrolled into view
description: Verifies that scale-in reveal elements become visibly revealed on intersection.

steps.description: Scroll down to a section containing prominent cards, stats, or callouts
Verify element "a callout/card that scales into view" is visible
Scroll further down to another section with a different set of callouts or cards
Verify element "another callout/card that scales into view" is visible

title: Staggered reveal with delays shows items appearing progressively within a section
description: Verifies that multiple items in the same section reveal in sequence (stagger effect) rather than all at once.

steps.description: Scroll down to a section with multiple similar items (for example, a grid of services, process steps, or a set of cards)
Verify element "the first item in the group" is visible
Verify element "a later item in the same group" is visible
Verify element "the later item in the same group" is visible

title: Reveal animations do not block reading and interacting with visible content after reveal
description: Verifies that revealed content remains visible and usable after it appears.

steps.description: Scroll down to the services or process section
Scroll slightly to ensure additional items in the section have appeared
Verify element "a visible CTA button/link in the revealed section" is visible
Click on "a visible CTA button/link in the revealed section"

title: Scroll reveal works consistently across multiple scroll passes on the landing page
description: Verifies that content remains visible after it has been revealed and does not disappear unexpectedly when scrolling away and back.

steps.description: Scroll down to a mid-page section with multiple content blocks
Verify element "a revealed content block in this section" is visible
Scroll further down by at least one full section
Scroll back up to the previously viewed section
Verify element "the same content block in the previously viewed section" is visible

title: Counters animate to their target values when stats section enters the viewport
description: Verifies the social proof counters start at 0 and animate up to their displayed target values when the stats section becomes visible.

steps.description: Wait for the homepage hero section to be visible
Scroll to the stats section that contains the social proof counters
Verify text "0" is visible within the stats counters area
Wait for the counters to finish changing values
Verify text "500+" is visible in the stats counters area
Verify text "10+" is visible in the stats counters area
Verify text "200+" is visible in the stats counters area

title: Desktop nav: Primary header CTA "Cotizar Ahora" navigates to the quote calculator
description: Verifies the main header CTA is present after header injection and routes to the quote calculator page.

steps.description: Wait for the header navigation bar to appear
Click "Cotizar Ahora" primary CTA in header

title: Desktop nav: Navigate to Case Studies page from header link
description: Verifies a standard header nav link takes the user to the Case Studies page.

steps.description: Wait for the header navigation bar to appear
Click on the "Casos" link in the header navigation

title: Desktop nav: Navigate to How We Work page from header link
description: Verifies the header link routes to the How We Work page and the page content is visible.

steps.description: Wait for the header navigation bar to appear
Click on the "Cómo trabajamos" link in the header navigation

title: Header partial delay: Header CTA is not immediately available until injection completes
description: Verifies the page initially loads without header CTA visible and then it appears after the header partial is injected.

steps.description: Verify element "Cotizar Ahora" is not visible
Wait for the header navigation bar to appear
Click "Cotizar Ahora" primary CTA in header

title: Theme toggle is present in header after partial load
description: Verifies the theme toggle control is visible in the loaded header (without validating styling changes).

steps.description: Wait for the header navigation bar to appear
Click on the theme toggle control in the header
Verify the header navigation bar is visible

title: Open a blog article from the listing page
description: Verifies a user can open an article page by clicking an article card on the blog listing.

steps.description: Click an article card on the blog listing page
Verify element "Volver al Blog" is visible

title: In-article CTA navigates to the quote calculator
description: Verifies an in-article CTA link sends the user from a blog post to the quote calculator page.

steps.description: Click an article card on the blog listing page
Click an in-article CTA link that points to the quote calculator

title: Return to blog listing using "Volver al Blog" from an article
description: Verifies a user can return to the blog listing from an article using the provided back-to-blog link.

steps.description: Click an article card on the blog listing page
Verify element "Volver al Blog" is visible

title: Navigate between articles using a related post link
description: Verifies related posts links on an article page navigate to another article page.

steps.description: Click an article card on the blog listing page
Click a related post link within the article page
Verify element "Volver al Blog" is visible

title: Deep-link to a known static blog article route loads correctly
description: Verifies a user can load a specific article page directly via its static route and see expected navigation elements.

steps.description: Verify element "Volver al Blog" is visible

title: In-article CTA is present and visible on different articles
description: Verifies multiple article pages contain at least one visible CTA that links to the quote calculator.

steps.description: Click an in-article CTA link that points to the quote calculator

title: Header partial renders after async fetch on the home page
description: Verifies the header area becomes visible after asynchronous partial injection on /index.html.
category: Partial Loading and Known Fetch Timing Limitation

steps.description: Wait for the header navigation area to appear at the top of the page

title: Contact partial renders after async fetch on the home page
description: Verifies the contact section/widget becomes visible after asynchronous partial injection on /index.html.
category: Partial Loading and Known Fetch Timing Limitation

steps.description: Scroll to the contact section area near the bottom of the page
Wait for the contact section to appear

title: Header CTA becomes clickable after partial injection (no navigation required)
description: Verifies a visible header call-to-action can be clicked only after the header partial has loaded.
category: Partial Loading and Known Fetch Timing Limitation

steps.description: Wait for the header navigation area to appear at the top of the page
Verify element "Header call-to-action button" is visible

title: Immediate interaction attempt before partial injection requires retry after waiting (header)
description: Verifies that if the header is not yet injected, waiting and retrying allows successful interaction.
category: Partial Loading and Known Fetch Timing Limitation

steps.description: Wait for the header navigation area to appear at the top of the page

title: Immediate interaction attempt before partial injection requires retry after waiting (contact)
description: Verifies that if the contact section is not yet injected, waiting and retrying makes the contact UI available.
category: Partial Loading and Known Fetch Timing Limitation

steps.description: Scroll to the contact section area near the bottom of the page
Verify element "Contact section" is not visible
Wait for the contact section to appear

title: Cookie consent banner does not block interaction after partials load
description: Verifies that once the header/contact partials are injected, the user can still interact with visible UI even if the cookie banner is present.
category: Partial Loading and Known Fetch Timing Limitation

steps.description: Wait for the header navigation area to appear at the top of the page
Scroll to the contact section area near the bottom of the page
Wait for the contact section to appear
Verify element "Cookie consent banner" is visible

title: Refresh home page still re-injects partials correctly
description: Verifies that reloading /index.html results in the header and contact partials becoming visible again after async injection.
category: Partial Loading and Known Fetch Timing Limitation

steps.description: Wait for the header navigation area to appear at the top of the page
Wait for the contact section to appear
